findings.reasoning: No underflow sequence found. Burns are admitted only after the current day has a word, then a single unresolved pool is enforced by `_pendingResolveDay`; a second day reverts while a prior day is unresolved (`contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1030`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1036`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1041`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1042`). Submit snaps `ethValueOwed` to gwei and increments the cumulative reserve by the telescoping delta `floor(newBase*175/100)-floor(prevBase*175/100)` (`contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1080`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1083`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1105`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1108`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:1113`). Resolve subtracts exactly the same reconstructed max from `pool.ethBase * 1e9`, then leaves the rolled amount reserved (`contracts/sDGNRS.sol:748`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:753`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:756`). Claim-side decrements cannot race this because claims require `redemptionPeriods[day] != 0`, which is written only after the resolve subtraction (`contracts/sDGNRS.sol:759`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:783`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:868`). The caller roll is always 25..175 (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1255`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1258`).

No source-level unbounded state-machine brick was found, but I could not rerun the gas harness because Foundry tried to write `forge-out` on a read-only filesystem. Source bounds: `_backfillGapDays` caps at 120 days (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1866`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1868`), subscriber-stage completion is split from backfill when both would compose (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:338`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:355`), and backfill is split from downstream jackpot work (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:388`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:398`). The orphan scan is syntactically uncapped, but only `_lrAdvanceIndexClearPending` advances `LR_INDEX`, and it is called only by request paths that share one `vrfRequestId/rngRequestTime` in-flight slot (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1137`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1143`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1660`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1686`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1696`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1890`). BAF winners are capped by a 107-slot returned array (`contracts/DegenerusJackpots.sol:255`, `contracts/DegenerusJackpots.sol:258`) before the Game loop (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameJackpotModule.sol:1929`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameJackpotModule.sol:1930`). Deity refunds are capped by 32 symbols / one owner per symbol (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameWhaleModule.sol:546`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameWhaleModule.sol:547`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameWhaleModule.sol:604`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:103`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:106`). Redemption lootboxes are capped per claimant by the 160 ETH base cap, max 175% roll, and 50/50 live split, so the 5 ETH loop is at most 28 chunks; this is a claim path, not advance/finalization, but its exact worst-case gas remains unmeasured here (`contracts/sDGNRS.sol:326`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:842`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:851`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:852`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameLootboxModule.sol:951`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameLootboxModule.sol:953`).

The latch is not sticky on revert. `handleGameOverDrain` sets `gameOver` before external burns and terminal jackpots, but all of those operations are in the same delegatecall transaction; any revert bubbles to `_handleGameOverPath`, so the latch and GO state roll back (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:135`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:139`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:142`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:177`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:191`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:692`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:698`). Final sweep similarly writes `GO_SWEPT` and debits claimables before sends, but `_sendStethFirst` reverts the whole tx on failed transfer/call, making it retryable (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:209`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:217`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:253`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:261`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:262`). The hardcoded ETH sinks accept ETH from the Game path (`contracts/DegenerusVault.sol:480`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:498`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:499`, `contracts/GNRUS.sol:651`).

The masked liveness window is reachable, but not a permanent deadlock under the stated honest-governance model. `_livenessTriggered` returns false while `lastPurchaseDay` or `jackpotPhaseFlag` is set (`contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:1464`, `contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:1465`), and `_handleGameOverPath` is skipped in those productive phases (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:188`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:206`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:209`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:210`). Normal advance still reaches `rngGate` in those phases; a stale request can be retried after 12h (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:374`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1267`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1270`). If the coordinator itself is dead, governance can rotate and reissue the in-flight request while preserving daily or mid-day state (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1765`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1772`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1778`).

Post-liveness queue/bet resolution can strand optional player upside, but it does not block finalization. `_queueTickets*` deliberately reverts when liveness is active (`contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:618`, `contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:650`, `contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:703`), while `advanceGame` checks game-over liveness before the subscriber stage can run (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:209`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:210`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:630`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:328`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:330`). `resolveBets` also reverts after liveness (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameDegeneretteModule.sol:429`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameDegeneretteModule.sol:435`), but bet stakes were already moved into prize pools at placement/resolution accounting, and `handleGameOverDrain` distributes funds from balances net of `claimablePool`, not by iterating pending bets (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:78`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:86`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:164`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:191`). Pending sDGNRS redemptions are resolved by the game-over entropy path before drain and post-gameOver claims skip the lootbox leg (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1315`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1320`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:786`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:849`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:899`, `contracts/sDGNRS.sol:902`).

No permanent no-word state found under honest governance. Daily requests set `vrfRequestId`, clear `rngWordCurrent`, set `rngRequestTime`, and set the daily lock (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1693`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1696`). A valid callback stores the daily word; stale request IDs are ignored rather than bricking (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1832`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1840`). If no word arrives, normal `rngGate` can retry after 12h (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1267`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1270`), and terminal liveness can use current VRF or historical fallback after 14d (`contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:1471`, `contracts/storage/DegenerusGameStorage.sol:1472`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1327`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1338`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1355`). Mid-day lootbox RNG has a 6h retry and coordinator rotation preserves the same reserved index (`contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1153`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1160`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1167`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1769`, `contracts/modules/DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:1773`).

overallVerdict: No reachable CATASTROPHE permanent-halt counterexample was found in L1-L6. The only non-closed item is empirical gas margin for L2 because the read-only environment prevented rerunning the existing gas harness; source-level loop bounds and composition splits are present, but I am not marking the full gas-ceiling claim REFUTED without a fresh measurement.
